subject: feat(renderer): build complete form renderer with all 13 field types, validation, and conditions
body:
Phase 1 implementation — the form renderer defines the runtime contract:
- Validation engine: per-field validation for all types, page-level aggregation,
  hidden field exclusion from required checks
- Condition engine: all 10 operators (equals, contains, greater_than, in, etc.),
  AND/OR logic, page and field visibility evaluation
- 13 field components: text, textarea, email, phone, number, select, radio,
  checkbox_group, checkbox, date, rating, heading, hidden
- FormRenderer: multi-page navigation with progress bar, condition-based
  page/field visibility, submission with loading/error/success states,
  preview mode showing all pages with condition indicators
- Sample software discovery intake form exercising conditional pages
- Wired into PreviewPage (preview mode) and PublicFormPage (submission mode)

Both engines are pure functions — ready for server-side reuse in submission validation.

Tags: renderer, fields, validation, conditions, forms
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: form-builder
Semver: minor
